title: Fusion's PvP Modpack
description: My personal PvP modpack with all my optimizations, PvP QOL's, etc.
body:
# Fusion's PvP Modpack
This is my personal pvp mod pack. It contains various optimization mods to make the game run better, some pvp quality of life mods to make pvp less annoying, and various other utility mods. 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sV7nP4Yw7uY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Contact me
If you have any issues with the mod pack or a developer not wanting your mod included, please contact me on discord. My discord is _fusiongamer or join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/YrSWPbWDUF)
